# QCS Dental Stress Test Report

## 1. Overview
- Clinic: **{clinic_name}**
- Region: {region}
- Period: {period_start} → {period_end}

### QCS Global Index
- Score: **{global_score} / 100**
- Grade: **{global_grade}**

---

## 2. Core Indices
| Index | Score (0-100) | Grade | Meaning |
|---|---:|:---:|---|
| Dental Resilience Score (DRS) | {drs} | {drs_grade} | Shock tolerance & investment resilience |
| Drift Detection Index (DDI) | {ddi} | {ddi_grade} | Early signals of silent deterioration |
| Dependency Risk Score (DeRS) | {ders} | {ders_grade} | Key-person risk & succession readiness |
| Structural Clarity Index (SCI) | {sci} | {sci_grade} | KPI/roles/process clarity |

---

## 3. What this helps you decide
- **Investment safety band** (equipment / chair units / CT)
- **Where the clinic breaks first** under shocks (patients, cancellations, staff)
- **Which lever improves resilience fastest** (fixed costs, cash runway, utilization, retention)
- **Succession & delegation roadmap** (reduce owner dependency)
